title: Cyrtochilum mandibulare
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum mandibulare belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This orchid species is a part of the genus Cyrtochilum. Cyrtochilum mandibulare is further classified into the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Maximiliinae. The subtribe is Gynopodium. Cyrtochilum mandibulare is native to South America.
